title: Add providerHQCountry typed-enum field to AIModelFamily entry (procurement-compliance trait)
description: Increasingly load-bearing for enterprise procurement compliance: which jurisdiction does the provider headquarter in? Affects data-sovereignty, GDPR / EU AI Act exposure, US executive-order compliance, and increasingly export-control posture. Proposed enum: ISO 3166 country code (`US`, `CN`, `FR`, `IL`, etc.) as either typed enum (frozen set of relevant countries) OR free-form string. Probably string for forward-flexibility. Populate per-family: Apple `US`, Google `US`, Anthropic `US`, OpenAI `US`, Meta `US`, Mistral `FR`, xAI `US`, DeepSeek `CN`, Cohere `CA`, Alibaba `CN`, Microsoft `US`, Amazon `US`. Substrate's VC-facing or enterprise-customer-facing surfaces will read this for procurement filters.
